# blendMode

**Instance Property**

The blend mode used to blend the shape into the parent’s framebuffer.

## Declaration

```swift
var blendMode: SKBlendMode { get set }
```

## Discussion

The default value is [doc://com.apple.spritekit/documentation/SpriteKit/SKBlendMode/alpha].
